questionHtml: Outline why the value obtained in (b)(i) might differ from a value calculated using ΔHf data.
markschemeHtml:
«N-H» bond enthalpy is an average «and may not be the precise value in NH3» ✔

 

Accept ΔHf data are more accurate / are not average values.

meta.title: Outline why the value obtained in (b)(i) might differ from a value calculated using ΔHf data.
